title: Blackspur BB-CT116 Cable Clips Set
features: • Set includes: 55 x 6mm cable clips, 30 x 8mm cable clips and 15 x 10mm cable clip
description: Product Description Blackspur cable clip set contains the following white cable clip of sizes - 6mm by 55 Piece, 8mm by 30 Piece, 10mm by 15 Piece. Comes in blister card packaging. Supplying quality products. One of the most comprehensive ranges of hand tools and DIY associated products in the UK. Box Contains 100x Cable Clip
